'''Ground Level Automated Defense Droid Systems''' (GLADDS), also known as '''Periscope Droids''', were [[Droid/Legends|droid]] turrets that defended the inside of the original [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="Secrets">''[[Super Star Wars Official Game Secrets]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars]]'' {{1st}}
